decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. It also includes disruptive elements like Force of Negation and Thoughtseize to control the game and protect the combo. With the ability to bring back creatures at instant speed and generate card advantage with Faithful Mending, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its explosive plays and versatile threats. The inclusion of unique cards like Psychic Frog and Superior Spider-Man adds unexpected interactions and surprises for the opponent.

This deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with an aggressive playstyle centered around the Affinity mechanic. By quickly playing out low-cost artifacts and creatures, generating value with Emry, Lurker of the Loch, and disrupting the opponent with cards like Metallic Rebuke and Unholy Heat, the deck puts pressure on the opponent early and often. The inclusion of Urza's Saga and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides additional utility and card advantage to help maintain momentum and close out games efficiently.

The key focus of this deck is to control the board through land destruction and removal spells, while utilizing creatures like Solitude and Kaheera, the Orphanguard for defense. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's mana base with cards like Cleansing Wildfire and Field of Ruin, while also having a finisher in Price of Freedom or Wrath of the Skies. The inclusion of Avengers Disassembled adds versatility in dealing with threats, while cards like Erode and Demolition Field serve as additional removal options. The overall strategy revolves around disrupting the opponent's resources and controlling the game tempo.

The deck aims to quickly fill up the graveyard with cards and then bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard to the battlefield using reanimation spells. By combining card draw, discard effects, and efficient removal, the deck sets up for explosive turns where it can cheat out large creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones. The key strategy is to assemble the combo pieces needed to reanimate creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan while overwhelming them with powerful threats. It is a fast-paced and aggressive deck that can win games in just a few turns.

The deck focuses on quickly putting pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls supported by versatile removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Prismatic Ending. The deck also benefits from cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to generate advantage and close out the game. The inclusion of Goblin Bombardment allows for additional reach and flexibility in dealing with threats. Additionally, the deck utilizes a mix of lands to ensure consistent mana sources for its powerful threats and spells.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive plays using efficient creatures such as Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls. It also utilizes powerful spells like Thraben Charm and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to maintain pressure on the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive elements like Blood Moon and Goblin Bombardment to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of creature aggression and disruptive spells, while also utilizing cards like Elegant Parlor and Ranger-Captain of Eos for added versatility and card advantage.

The deck focuses on using cards like Violent Outburst and Living End to quickly cycle through your deck, using creatures like Shardless Agent and Generous Ent to control the board until you can cast Living End and bring all your creatures back onto the battlefield. The deck also includes powerful creatures like Oliphaunt and Waker of Waves to apply pressure and streamline the combo. The deck aims to disrupt your opponent's game plan while setting up your own win condition through cycling and cascading your spells.

This deck focuses on combining the instant reanimation ability of cards like Goryo's Vengeance with powerful creatures like Griselbrand, using cards like Atraxa, Grand Unifier to generate additional value. The deck also includes control elements like Force of Negation and Thoughtseize to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Additionally, cards like Ephemerate and Solitude provide removal and protection, allowing the deck to stay ahead in the game. With a well-timed reanimation and efficient use of resources, this deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

This deck focuses on aggressive, fast-paced tactics combined with the ability to temporarily remove key threats from the battlefield through blinking effects. By using cards like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp to repeatedly exile and return creatures, the deck can disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining pressure with creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to further control the game and pave the way for a lethal attack.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with key combo pieces like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, then using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Shadowy Backstreet to bring them back onto the battlefield for a powerful instant reanimation strategy. The deck also includes protection spells like Force of Negation and Solitude to help protect the combo pieces. Additionally, cards like Ephemerate and Faithful Mending provide additional graveyard manipulation and card draw to further support the reanimation strategy. The goal is to quickly assemble the combo and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and efficiently combo off by exploiting the graveyard and reanimating powerful creatures for a game-winning play. Utilizing cards like Quantum Riddler, Goryo's Vengeance, and Ephemerate, the deck aims to bring back creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier from the graveyard for explosive plays. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive elements like Force of Negation and Thoughtseize to protect the combo and disrupt opponents' strategies. Prismatic Ending and Faithful Mending provide additional utility and consistency to the deck.

This deck aims to control the game by ramping up mana quickly with Eldrazi Temple and Ugin's Labyrinth, before casting powerful Eldrazi creatures such as Emrakul, Ulamog, and Devourer of Destiny. The deck also includes cards like Kozilek's Command and Kozilek's Return for removal and disruption. Through the Breach allows for quick summoning of Eldrazi creatures, while cards like Stock Up and Dress Down provide card advantage and versatility. The inclusion of Yggdrasil, Rebirth Engine offers additional recursion options. The deck's strategy revolves around overwhelming the opponent with massive Eldrazi threats while maintaining control of the game.

This deck focuses on assembling different pieces to create powerful combo plays. It utilizes cards like Thud, Plunge into Darkness, and Spoils of the Vault to find key combo pieces quickly. Inquisition of Kozilek helps disrupt the opponent's game plan while cards like Aloe Alchemist and Callous Sell-Sword provide utility. The deck also includes strong finishers like Chancellor of the Dross and Devourer of Destiny to close out games. With a mix of card selection, disruption, and powerful combo potential, this deck aims to win the game quickly and decisively.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays while utilizing blink effects to gain additional value from creatures and spells. By combining powerful creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Guide of Souls with blink spells like Ephemerate and Consign to Memory, the deck can maintain pressure on opponents while generating card advantage. The inclusion of cards like Witch Enchanter and Haliya, Guided by Light adds additional utility, while Ranger-Captain of Eos helps to find key pieces of the deck. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly while outvaluing them through efficient use of blink effects.

This deck revolves around using Eldrazi creatures and artifacts to generate mana and control the board, while also utilizing combo pieces like Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker to create powerful interactions. Emrakul, the Promised End serves as a game-ending threat, while cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble provide disruption and removal. The deck also includes Urza's Saga for additional ramp and tutoring, as well as Blade of the Bloodchief for creature buffing. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful synergies.

The main concept of this deck is to generate mana quickly using cards like Lotus Bloom and Hydroelectric Specimen, while using combo pieces like Goblin Charbelcher and Whir of Invention to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes various counterspells and disruption spells to control the board and protect its key pieces. Overall, the goal is to assemble a powerful win condition without relying on traditional land cards, creating a unique and unexpected playstyle in the Modern format.
